hero_subtitle: SFTY helps custodians link wallet risk signals, transaction activity and sanctions exposure into structured screening workflows with audit-ready evidence and case management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Wallet screening risks remain incomplete and scattered
problem_description: Custodians often face slow and manual wallet risk assessment due to disconnected provider outputs and fragmented data sources. This separation weakens oversight of wallet activity, source-of-funds analysis, and sanctions exposure, complicating compliance and review workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates wallet screening, transaction risk, and source-of-funds signals into one unified case management workflow so custodians can efficiently assess and document on-chain compliance risks.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects wallet screening and transaction risk signals through alert triage, case creation, reviewer decisions and evidence preservation for custodian compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One risk evidence layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects wallet screening, transaction monitoring and risk signals into structured cases, decisions and evidence, giving custodians clearer operational control and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports custodians with a controlled compliance layer that connects wallet risk signals and preserves audit-ready evidence for due diligence and enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support custodian wallet screening workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how wallet risk signals connect to case reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved for wallet screening

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for custodian compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides custodians a connected compliance layer to connect wallet risk signals, transaction monitoring, sanctions screening and case workflows into one structured operational system.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support custodian wallet screening?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet risk data, links wallets to customers, screens transactions and sanctions exposure, creates alerts, and routes reviews through customizable workflows for stronger custodian oversight.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve wallet risk evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves all wallet screening alerts, decision logs, evidence packages and case histories to support audit-ready review and traceability across customer, wallet and transaction risk.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY can connect to your existing KYC, KYT, screening and Travel Rule providers to connect outputs into a consistent workflow without disrupting your compliance stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace wallet screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above wallet screening providers, connecting their outputs into cases and evidence rather than replacing underlying vendor services.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects wallet risk, transaction monitoring and sanctions exposure into audit-ready cases and evidence packages.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
